title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 359.521 - Names of foreign limited partnership regulated
text:
359.521.  Names of foreign limited partnership regulated. — A foreign limited partnership may register with the secretary of state under any name (whether or not it is the name under which it is registered in its state of organization) that could be registered by a domestic limited partnership.
(L. 1985 H.B. 512 & 650) 
Effective 1-01-87
